mapper.insert:
select project_seq.nextval from dual
insert into projects values( #{dto.project_seq}, #{dto.project_name}, #{dto.contents}, #{dto.start_date}, #{dto.end_date}, #{dto.status}, #{loginId}, sysdate)
mapper.select: select p.*, pm.users_id as member_users_id , u.name, u.sysname from projects p left join project_members pm on pm.project_seq = p.project_seq left join users u on u.id = pm.users_id where p.users_id = #{loginId} or pm.users_id = #{loginId} order by p.created_at
